message:
style(widgets): apply rustfmt to adaptive radix tree implementation

Formatting-only changes from cargo fmt: struct field alignment, match
arm formatting, function signature line breaks, test array literal
layout, and removal of unused BTreeMap import. Also fixes a spurious
mut annotation on old_inner (Node4 split path) that became unnecessary
after the prior node-split refactor, and changes the collect_all_inner
value binding to _ since inner-node values are unreachable without the
full key context.

No behavioral changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
